accurate.why: Accurately describes the disapproval resolution and its effect.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the resolution as disapproving the CFPB small business lending rule under the CRA.

exceptions_conditions.why: No material exceptions or conditions in this resolution.

effective_dates.why: No specific effective dates beyond enactment.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures the sole operative provision: disapproval nullifying the identified CFPB rule.

correct_figures.why: 88 Fed. Reg. 35150 and May 31, 2023 publication date are accurate.
